title: netfix
body:
## netfix

netfix is a compatibility mod that resolves networking issues caused by the outdated version of Netty in older Minecraft versions.

---

### Support

Support is offered in our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/Kvkk4u272Z).

---

### What It Does

netfix backports modern Netty (version 4.2.12, to be precise) in order to fix these issues. It also implements features from https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/fast-ip-ping.

---

### What It Fixes

If you're experiencing unexplained connection issues, crashes related to networking, or server pinging not working properly, netfix may resolve them instantly.
